zh.Rattlesden, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可拉特萊斯登
zh.Brettenham, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可布迪納姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Munning於1488年1月26日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可內吉時，他的父親Henry Munning32歲，母親Alice Pye28歲。他於1515年與Agnes Barker在英國素福爾可內吉結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1557年5月28日在英國素福爾可內吉享年69歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可內吉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Munning于1488年1月26日出生在英国英格兰素福爾可內吉时，他的父亲Henry Munning32岁，母亲Alice Pye28岁。他于1515年与Agnes Barker在英国素福爾可內吉结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1557年5月28日在英国素福爾可內吉享年69岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可內吉。

nameMeanings.name: Munning
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Munding (Old English * Munding, a derivative of names in Mund- or -mund).

variants.name: Munnings
meanings: English (Suffolk): variant of Munning, with post-medieval excrescent -s. Munning is from the Middle English personal name Munding (Old English Munding, a derivative of names in Mund- or -mund). This form of the surname is the more common one in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Munning was born on 26 January 1488, in Nedging, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Munning, was 32 and his mother, Alice Pye, was 28. He married Agnes Barker in 1515, in Nedging, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 28 May 1557, in Nedging, Suffolk, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Nedging, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Munning est né le 26 janvier 1488, à Nedging, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Munning, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alice Pye, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Barker en 1515, à Nedging, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 28 mai 1557, à Nedging, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Nedging, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Munning am 26. Januar 1488 in Nedging, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Munning 32 und seine Mutter Alice Pye 28. Er hat 1515 in Nedging, Suffolk, England Agnes Barker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 28. Mai 1557 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Nedging, Suffolk, England und wurde in Nedging, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Munning è nato il il 26 gennaio 1488 nel Nedging, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry Munning, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Alice Pye, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Barker nel 1515, nel Nedging, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 28 maggio 1557, nel Nedging, Suffolk, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Nedging, Suffolk, England.

ja.Brettenham, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクブレッテンハム
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Munningが1488年1月26日にイギリスイギリススフォルクネドジングで生まれた時，父Henry Munningは32歳，母Alice Pyeは28歳であった。1515年にイギリススフォルクネドジングでAgnes Barkerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1557年5月28日にイギリススフォルクネドジングで69歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクネドジングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Munning(이)가 1488년 1월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 네지잉에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Munning(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Pye(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1515년 영국 수폴크 네지잉에서 Agnes Barker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1557년 5월 28일 영국 수폴크 네지잉에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 네지잉에 묻혔다.

mn.26 Jan 1488–28 May 1557: 1488 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 26–1557 оны Тавдугаар сарын 28

pt.26 Jan 1488–28 May 1557: 26 de janeiro de 1488–28 de maio de 1557
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Munning nasceu em 26 de janeiro de 1488, em Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Munning, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alice Pye, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Barker em 1515, em Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de maio de 1557, em Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Munning родился 26 января 1488 г. в местности неджинг, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry Munning было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Pye, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Barker в 1515 г. в местности неджинг, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 28 мая 1557 г. в местности неджинг, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности неджинг, суффолк, Англия.

es.26 Jan 1488–28 May 1557: 26 de enero de 1488–28 de mayo de 1557
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Munning nació el 26 de enero de 1488, en Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry Munning, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Alice Pye, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Agnes Barker en 1515, en Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 28 de mayo de 1557, en Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
